arguments.content:
---
meta:
  created_at: 2026-04-16T17:40:00+08:00
  author: MetaClaw Agent
  status: Draft
---

# Deployment Readiness Checklist

**Project**: Project Orion - New Features Release  
**Version**: 2026.04.16  
**Last Updated**: 2026-04-16T17:40:00+08:00

---

## Overview

This checklist ensures all new features are ready for production deployment. All items must be completed and verified before deployment proceeds.

---

## 1. Code Review

### Pre-Merge Requirements
- [ ] All code changes reviewed by at least one senior engineer
- [ ] No critical or high-severity issues unresolved
- [ ] Code follows team style guidelines (PEP 8 for Python)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials in source code
- [ ] No debug code (print statements, console.log) left in production code
- [ ] All TODO comments have associated tickets

### Architecture Review
- [ ] New APIs follow RESTful design principles
- [ ] Database migrations are backward-compatible
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing public APIs
- [ ] Performance implications considered for high-traffic endpoints

### Security Review
- [ ] Input validation implemented for all user inputs
- [ ] SQL injection prevention verified (parameterized queries only)
- [ ] XSS prevention verified (output encoding for HTML content)
- [ ] Authentication/authorization checks on all protected endpoints
- [ ] Rate limiting configured for public-facing APIs

---

## 2. Test Coverage

### Unit Tests
- [ ] All new functions have corresponding unit tests
- [ ] Unit test coverage ≥ 80% for new code
- [ ] All unit tests passing in CI pipeline
- [ ] Edge cases and error conditions tested
- [ ] Mock external dependencies appropriately

### Integration Tests
- [ ] API integration tests cover all new endpoints
- [ ] Database integration tests verify migrations
- [ ] Third-party service integrations tested with sandbox/test environments
- [ ] Authentication flow integration tests passing

### End-to-End Tests
- [ ] Critical user journeys covered by E2E tests
- [ ] E2E tests passing in staging environment
- [ ] Cross-browser testing completed (if UI changes)
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness verified (if applicable)

### Performance Tests
- [ ] Load testing completed for high-traffic endpoints
- [ ] Response times within acceptable thresholds (< 200ms p95)
- [ ] Memory usage profiled and within acceptable limits
- [ ] Database query performance verified (no N+1 queries)

---

## 3. Documentation

### Technical Documentation
- [ ] API documentation updated (OpenAPI/Swagger specs)
- [ ] README files updated with new setup instructions
- [ ] Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) created for significant changes
- [ ] Database schema documentation updated
- [ ] Environment variable documentation updated

### Operational Documentation
- [ ] Runbooks created for new operational procedures
- [ ] Monitoring and alerting documentation updated
- [ ] Troubleshooting guides updated with new failure modes
- [ ] Deployment procedures documented

### User Documentation
- [ ] User-facing documentation updated
- [ ] Help articles created for new features
- [ ] Release notes drafted and reviewed
- [ ] Training materials prepared (if required)

---

## 4. Rollback Plan

### Prerequisites
- [ ] Database backups scheduled and verified before deployment
- [ ] Previous application version artifacts available
- [ ] Rollback procedure tested in staging environment
- [ ] Rollback decision criteria documented

### Database Rollback
- [ ] Database migrations are reversible
- [ ] Down-migration scripts tested
- [ ] Data compatibility between versions verified
- [ ] Rollback data validation procedures defined

### Application Rollback
- [ ] Blue-green or canary deployment strategy configured
- [ ] Traffic can be redirected to previous version within 5 minutes
- [ ] Feature flags configured for gradual rollout
- [ ] Health checks can detect deployment failures

### Communication Plan
- [ ] Stakeholder notification template prepared
- [ ] Escalation contacts list updated
- [ ] Status page update procedures documented
- [ ] Customer communication plan defined

### Rollback Triggers
- [ ] Error rate threshold defined (> 1% error rate triggers rollback)
- [ ] Response time threshold defined (> 500ms p95 triggers rollback)
- [ ] Customer complaint threshold defined
- [ ] Manual rollback trigger authority assigned

---

## 5. Pre-Deployment Verification

### Environment Checks
- [ ] Production environment health checks passing
- [ ] All dependent services operational
- [ ] Sufficient capacity available (CPU, memory, disk)
- [ ] SSL certificates valid and not expiring soon

### Monitoring Setup
- [ ] Application metrics dashboards updated
- [ ] Alerting rules configured for new features
- [ ] Log aggregation verified
- [ ] Error tracking configured (Sentry/DataDog)

### Deployment Verification
- [ ] Staging deployment successful and stable for 24+ hours
- [ ] Smoke tests passing in staging
- [ ] Feature flags configured in production
- [ ] Database migration dry-run completed successfully

---

## Sign-Off

| Role | Name | Signature | Date |
|------|------|-----------|------|
| Tech Lead | Alex Zhang | _________________ | _______ |
| Backend Lead | Bai | _________________ | _______ |
| QA Lead | Dana | _________________ | _______ |
| Product Manager | [PM Name] | _________________ | _______ |

---

## Deployment Execution Log

| Step | Status | Time | Notes |
|------|--------|------|-------|
| Pre-deployment checks | ⬜ | | |
| Database migration | ⬜ | | |
| Application deployment | ⬜ | | |
| Smoke tests | ⬜ | | |
| Traffic switch | ⬜ | | |
| Post-deployment verification | ⬜ | | |

---

**Checklist Version**: 1.0  
**Next Review Date**: 2026-05-16
